title: GEPA Evolution Kanban Card
description: One card per skill in the GEPA skill evolution pipeline. Card state is driven by run results, not manual updates.

status.description: Current column on the kanban board

priority.description: Derived from |best_delta|: high ≥10%, medium ≥3%, else low

latest_run_path.description: Absolute path to the latest run's output directory

latest_delta.description: improvement = evolved_score - baseline_score from the latest run

best_delta.description: Highest improvement seen across all runs for this skill

eval_source.description: How the eval dataset was built

iterations.description: Iterations run in the latest run

constraints_passed.description: Whether the evolved skill passed all constraint checks

is_multi_run.description: True if more than one run exists for this skill

is_recent.description: True if the latest run is within 24 hours of now

elapsed_seconds.description: Wall-clock time of the latest run in seconds
